items.name: theme
items.title: RVLT Flow theme
items.description: Espresso-dark theme tokens (globals.css) — drop-in app/globals.css.

items.name: utils
items.title: cn()
items.description: clsx + tailwind-merge helper.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: RVLT pill button — primary/halo/line/ghost/cream, tactile press, loading state.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Labelled status soft-fill pill (ok/warn/overbooked/repair).

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: 2px outline + hard offset shadow; `interactive` hover-lift, `live` active state.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: 2px outline, red focus ring, 16px text (no iOS zoom), aria-invalid error state.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Input twin — 2px outline, red focus ring, 16px text.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Form label — 14px medium, --ink-2.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: 2px outline, fills red when checked.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Pill track, fills red when on.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Input-like trigger + elevated panel with red check.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal — --scrim overlay, 2px outline + --lit elevated panel, BC Alphapipe title.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Off-canvas panel (sidebar / side drawer), --scrim + elevated surface.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Mobile bottom sheet (vaul) — grab handle, rounded-top elevated surface.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Floating elevated surface, 2px outline + --lit.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Menu surface — items highlight --paper-2, red check.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Small elevated chip.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Search / command palette (cmdk) on the elevated surface; CommandDialog.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Toaster (Sonner)
items.description: Chunky status toasts — 2px outline + hard offset; bottom on mobile.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Pill list; active tab lifts to --elev + --lit.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion / FAQ
items.description: Native-feel FAQ — `+` rotates 45° on open, open item lifts to --elev.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Calm data table — 1px row dividers, row hover --elev; pair figures with font-mono.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: 1px --line divider.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder — solid --elev pulse (no gradient), motion-safe.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Crew avatar — 8-hue deterministic palette + AA-safe theme-aware initials (§3.7). `PersonAvatar name=…`.

items.name: flow-mascot
items.title: Flow mascot
items.description: The moving-head mascot SVG (concept idle pose, §11) — empty/loading/success.

items.name: stat
items.title: Stat
items.description: Display-type figure + faint label; `bright` for the one 38px stat (§9).

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty state
items.description: Mascot + operator-voice line — the sanctioned home for personality in-app (§15.5).

items.name: stepper
items.title: Lifecycle stepper
items.description: The signature project-status spine (§15.4a) — vertical on mobile, horizontal on desktop.
